name: shape-onboarding
description: Retired Onboarding V2 archive. The Cloudflare project redirects to the canonical Onboarding V1 continuous radial-controls flow.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name shape-onboarding --branch main --commit-hash local-demo --commit-message "Retire Onboarding V2 and redirect to Onboarding V1" --commit-dirty=true
